title: Implement SSN state management on NVM failure in oscore_protect_request
description: For OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED from persist_ssn(), lock mutex again and either rollback sender_seq (decrement) or advance it to a safe value (e.g. current + 256 or next power-of-two boundary) to prevent nonce reuse on subsequent reboot. Choose approach based on security analysis. Update error return path. See oscore.c:1442 and oscore_ctx_persist_ssn.
close_reason: Decomposed into subtasks project-LICHEN-ow3c.1.3.2.1 to project-LICHEN-ow3c.1.3.2.4
